sql_array: CREATE TABLE subscriptions (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), status VARCHAR(10));
CREATE TABLE publishers (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE sync_logs (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY, sub_id INT, sync_time TIMESTAMP);
SELECT repl_sync_all() WHERE 1 NOT IN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sync_logs WHERE sync_time IS NOT NULL) AND id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM subscriptions WHERE status = 'inactive');
SELECT name FROM publishers WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT sub_id FROM sync_logs);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscriptions WHERE status IS NULL HAVING COUNT(id) NOT IN (SELECT id FROM publishers);
SELECT id, name FROM subscriptions WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM publishers WHERE id = subscriptions.id) AND status NOT LIKE 'active';
SELECT repl_sync_all() WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sync_logs WHERE sub_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM subscriptions WHERE status IS NOT NULL));
